mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_session (id, user_id, title, last_question, transfer_suggested) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{lastQuestion,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, title, last_question, transfer_suggested, created_at, updated_at FROM ai_session WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_message ( id, session_id, user_id, role, content, model_name, can_answer, confidence, transfer_suggested, transfer_reason ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{modelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{canAnswer,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{confidence,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, CASE WHEN #{transferSuggested} = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, #{transferReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.session_id, m.user_id, m.role, m.content, m.model_name, m.can_answer, m.confidence, m.transfer_suggested, m.transfer_reason, m.created_at FROM ai_message m JOIN ai_session s ON s.id = m.session_id WHERE m.session_id = #{sessionId} AND s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC, m.id ASC
SELECT id, message_id, chunk_id, document_id, citation_index, source_title, snippet, similarity, created_at FROM ai_message_citation WHERE message_id = #{messageId} ORDER BY citation_index ASC
